description:
Patient-facing auth surfaces, designed against RULES.md (Committed Clay, Two-Voice, Serif-Lead, Patient Floor — body ≥16px, target 17-18px).

**Scope**
- `src/app/(app)/signup/page.tsx` — email + password primary; magic-link secondary path (recovery + accessibility option).
- `src/app/(app)/signin/page.tsx` — same shape, with a magic-link "trouble signing in?" exit.
- `src/app/(app)/mfa/enroll/page.tsx` — TOTP enrollment. MFA is **required** before viewing case detail (enforced in middleware — T-015), but enrollment offered at signup with a clear "set up now" CTA and a deferral path to `/dashboard` until the gate is hit.
- All forms server-action driven (App Router). No client-side auth state outside the session cookie.
- Honor `RULES.md` design system. No clinical blue, no gradient text, no em dashes in body copy. `LegalReviewBanner` not needed here.

**Out of scope**
- Passkey enrollment (Phase A.5, post-launch).
- Password reset UX → handled by better-auth defaults + magic-link path; revisit if friction shows up.

**Acceptance**
- Signup → email verification → first sign-in works end-to-end against the local stack.
- MFA enrollment creates a `two_factor` row; the dashboard is accessible without MFA; the case-detail page requires it.
- Visual review against DESIGN.md tokens once T-010 is complete.
title: Sign-up / sign-in UI + MFA enrollment
